features.featureTitle: In KitchenUtensils.tsx, replace all broken or missing product image references with the newly generated static image assets stored in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Each of the 5 product cards must display its corresponding generated image: Milton Insignia Casserole, Crystal Wooden Serving Trays, Milton Pearl Thermoware Insulated Casserole, Senso Finger Chipser, and Cello Puro Kids & Junior Water Bottles. Use tags with correct relative paths pointing to frontend/public/assets/generated/.

In HouseholdProducts.tsx, replace the broken or missing dustbin product image reference with the newly generated static image asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/. The single product card must display the colorful dustbins image visibly using an tag with the correct path.

In ProductCategories.tsx, replace all broken or missing category card images with the newly generated static image assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Each of the 6 category cards (Stainless Steel Utensils, Pressure Cookers, Cookware Sets, Kitchen Tools, Plastic Household Items, Gift Items) must display a visible generated image that is visually appropriate for that category.

In the Featured Products Showcase section (if it exists as a component), replace all broken or missing product images with the newly generated static image assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Each of the 8 product cards (Steel Tiffin Box, Pressure Cooker 5L, Non-Stick Kadai, Steel Glass Set, Casserole Set, Mixing Bowls Set, Vegetable Chopper, Stainless Steel Thali) must display a visible generated image appropriate for that product.

In the Photo Gallery section, replace all broken or missing gallery images with the newly generated static image assets in frontend/public/assets/generated/. All 6 gallery grid items must display visible product or store images.
